Amazon is currently offering the Ninja Artisan Electric Outdoor Pizza Oven with Stone for $229.95 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. Normally going for $300 at full price, the deal here gives you 30% cut from the tag for $70 savings that is only beaten out by the $200 low we last saw during March’s Big Spring Sale. Jumping on this deal gives you the next-best price, while also giving you and your loved ones prolonged savings by making your own pizzas rather than buying from restaurants at higher prices. You can find many more Ninja appliance deals in the official Amazon storefront here.
